name: Bangalore Palace
description: Historic palace with grand rooms, gardens, and a strong city heritage feel.

name: Tipu Sultan's Summer Palace
description: Compact wooden palace connected to Bengaluru's older history.

name: Lalbagh Botanical Garden
description: Large botanical garden with glasshouse, walking paths, and calm green space.

name: Cubbon Park
description: Central green space suited for slow walks and a relaxed break from traffic.

name: ISKCON Temple Bangalore
description: Major temple complex with peaceful spaces, architecture, and vegetarian food options.

name: Visvesvaraya Industrial and Technological Museum
description: Interactive science and technology museum that works well for families and students.

name: Government Museum Bengaluru
description: One of India's older museums, with archaeology, art, and regional history exhibits.

name: Commercial Street
description: Busy shopping area for clothes, accessories, footwear, and quick bites.

name: UB City
description: Upscale shopping and dining complex in central Bengaluru.

name: VV Puram Food Street
description: Popular vegetarian food street with dosas, sweets, chaats, and local snacks.
